name: Honey Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the egg whites and yolks. Put the yolks in a large bowl. Add the honey, sugar, lukewarm coffee, oil, and brandy. Stir with a wooden spoon until well combined. Add the cinnamon, cloves, and ginger, and stir until the mixture is smooth.
2. In another bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, and bicarbonate of soda. Gradually add this dry mixture to the wet mixture, stirring gently until just combined. Fold in the crushed walnuts or pecans and almonds.
3. Beat the egg whites with a pinch of salt until stiff peaks form. Gently fold the egg whites into the batter, taking care not to deflate them.
4. Grease an oven tray (about 20x30 cm) with margarine and dust with flour. Pour in the batter, spreading it evenly. Sprinkle the almonds on top.
5. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (180°C/350°F) for about one hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving. The flavor improves if left overnight.
